channel.title: Sensor on PureRandom.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Sensor on PureRandom.dev

item.title: ESP32 Super Mini Occupancy Sensor
item.description: The ESP32-C3 Super Mini is a compact, cost-effective solution for IoT projects, and its low power consumption makes it ideal for continuous monitoring applications. When paired with a Force Sensitive Resistor (FSR) and ESPHome, it can be transformed into a reliable bed occupancy detector. Why Use an FSR for Bed Occupancy?
